## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or PII committed
- [ ] Database migrations (if any) are idempotent and reviewed
- [ ] Stripe / Twilio / webhook changes tested against test credentials
- [ ] Admin / patient auth flows re-verified if touched
